category_sources: source_facts.description says "Create icns files from the command-line".
source_facts.homepage is the official makeicns page for the command-line ICNS creator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage path and package metadata use makeicns.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and is the best available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive do not identify an official source-control repository; source archive is a distfile, not a repo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ICNS file creation from the command line.
source_facts.homepage contains icns/makeicns and source_facts.executables lists makeicns.
